name: Amaya High Speed 2GB USB Flash Drive
description: Compact and highly durable 2GB metal casing USB flash drive engineered by Amaya Premium Accessories, offering reliable files transmission and media storage.
warning: Do not eject the flash disk while file transfer operations are actively running.

name: Amaya High Speed 4GB USB Flash Drive
description: A pocket-sized 4GB high-speed flash drive built with solid metallic framing to securely store essential documents, multi-format images, and music tracks.
warning: Keep contact pins free from dust or liquid buildup to ensure stable device connection.

name: Amaya High Speed 8GB USB Flash Drive
description: Reliable 8GB storage memory stick optimized for quick daily data transfers, boasting full hardware cross-compatibility with laptops, cars, and smart screens.
warning: Format only to supported file systems like FAT32 or exFAT based on target equipment parameters.

name: Amaya High Speed 16GB USB Flash Drive
description: Ample 16GB metal flash drive providing high-velocity reads and writes for heavier multimedia, videos, blueprints, and large text collections.
warning: Avoid exposure to extreme external temperatures or strong magnetic currents.

name: Amaya Ultra Fast 32GB USB Flash Drive
description: High performance 32GB data flash drive processing hyper speeds up to 100MB/s for seamless HD streaming, massive backup storage, and heavy data migration cycles.
warning: Achieving max 100MB/s metrics requires connection to a fully compliant high-speed USB hub interface.

name: Amaya Pro Performance 256GB USB Flash Drive
description: The ultimate institutional storage asset. Packs a massive 256GB workspace delivering speeds up to 100MB/s inside a sleek armored frame to manage large file archives and system images.
warning: Keep your root data secured via system level encryption solutions when handling highly confidential assets.
